learningObjectives: Recognise and use twelve Starters toy and weather words.
Describe the weather with It's + adjective (sunny, rainy, windy, cloudy).
Form plural toy nouns with -s (kites, balloons, puzzles).
Use these and those for toys near and far.
Read about Mai's rainy day indoors and flying a kite outside.
Listen for toy and weather words with Mai, Nam, Anna and parents.
Write and speak short sentences about toys and weather.
unit.readingSkillFocus: Describe Pictures with Weather and Toys

vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Anna thích búp bê của cô ấy.
Đây là gấu bông của tôi.
Nam có một người máy màu đỏ.
Họ chơi xếp hình trong nhà.
Anna có một quả bóng bay màu xanh.

grammarReference.structure: It's + weather adjective: It's sunny / It's rainy
grammarReference.explanation: It is (It's) + tính từ thời tiết để mô tả trời: It's sunny. It's rainy and windy.
commonMistakes: It sunny (×) → It's sunny (✓) — cần is

grammarReference.structure: Plural nouns: two kites, three balloons
grammarReference.explanation: Thêm -s sau số lớn hơn một: one kite, two kites. one balloon, two balloons.
These = nhiều vật gần (These are my toys). Those = nhiều vật xa hơn (Those balloons are on the chair).
examples: Those balloons are red and blue.
That kite is by the door.
commonMistakes: These is my toys (×) → These are my toys (✓)
Those is balloons (×) → Those balloons are… (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Toys
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and use doll, kite, teddy and robot in short sentences.

exercises.title: Learn: Toy Words
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the best toy.

questions.questionText: You hug this soft toy at night.
questions.explanation: Teddy (gấu bông) — đồ chơi mềm để ôm.

questions.questionText: You fly this on a windy day outside.
questions.explanation: Kite (diều) — thả khi có gió.

questions.questionText: A girl often plays with this toy person.
questions.explanation: Doll (búp bê) — đồ chơi hình người.

questions.questionText: Nam has a red _____ that can move.
questions.explanation: Robot — Nam has a red robot.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Toys
exercises.instructions: Match each toy to its Vietnamese meaning.

questions.questionText: Match toys to their Vietnamese meanings.
questions.explanation: Doll=búp bê; kite=diều; teddy=gấu bông; robot=người máy.

exercises.title: Check: Toys Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Mai plays with her teddy and her _____.
questions.explanation: Doll — Mai plays with her teddy and her doll.

questions.questionText: Dad says Mai can fly her _____ outside.
questions.explanation: Kite — fly your kite outside.

questions.questionText: Which toy is soft and you can hug?
questions.explanation: Teddy — soft toy to hug.

exercises.title: Apply: Toys in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct toy word.

questions.questionText: Complete: Mai has a [0]. | Nam has a [1]. | Fly the [2] outside.
questions.explanation: teddy/doll; robot; kite — đồ chơi Mai và Nam.

content.template: Mai has a [0]. Nam has a [1]. Fly the [2] outside.

exercises.title: Review: Toys Mix
exercises.instructions: Mixed review. Choose carefully.

questions.questionText: Which word means 'diều'?
questions.explanation: Kite = diều.

questions.questionText: Anna likes her _____.
questions.explanation: Doll — Anna likes her doll (from listening).

choices.distractorNote: Có gió — không phải đồ chơi

questions.questionText: Which toy does Nam have on the table?
questions.explanation: Puzzle — His puzzle is on the table (listening).

lessons.title: Lesson 2: More Toys and Weather
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise puzzle, balloon, sunny and rainy in context.

exercises.title: Learn: Toys and Weather Words
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: You put many small pieces together to make a picture.
questions.explanation: Puzzle (xếp hình) — ghép mảnh thành hình.

questions.questionText: This round toy floats in the air when you blow it.
questions.explanation: Balloon (bóng bay) — thổi phồng, bay lên.

questions.questionText: The sun is in the sky. It is _____.
questions.explanation: Sunny (nắng) — có nắng, trời đẹp.

questions.questionText: Water falls from the sky. It is _____.
questions.explanation: Rainy (mưa) — trời mưa.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Toys and Weather
exercises.instructions: Match each word to a short description.

questions.questionText: Match words to descriptions.
questions.explanation: Puzzle=pieces on table; balloon=blue/red float; sunny=sun out; rainy=stay inside.

pairs.right: red and blue, on the chair

exercises.title: Check: Toys and Weather Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Today is _____. We stay inside.
questions.explanation: Rainy — Today is rainy. We stay inside.

questions.questionText: Those _____ are red and blue.
questions.explanation: Balloons — Those balloons are red and blue.

questions.questionText: They do a _____ together inside.
questions.explanation: Puzzle — They do a puzzle together.

exercises.title: Apply: Toys and Weather Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence.

questions.questionText: Complete: It is [0]. | Anna has a blue [1]. | They do a [2].
questions.explanation: rainy/sunny; balloon; puzzle — thời tiết và đồ chơi.

content.template: It is [0]. Anna has a blue [1]. They do a [2].

exercises.title: Review: Toys and Weather Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: When it is _____, Mai flies her kite outside.
questions.explanation: Sunny — When the sun comes out, it is sunny.

questions.questionText: Which word is a weather word, not a toy?
questions.explanation: Rainy là thời tiết. Balloon, puzzle, robot là đồ chơi.

questions.questionText: Mum says: Look at the _____!
questions.explanation: Clouds — Look at the clouds!

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Cloud, Wind, Cloudy and Windy
lessons.learningObjective: Use cloud, wind, cloudy and windy with toy words.

exercises.title: Learn: Cloud and Wind Words
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: White or grey things in the sky.
questions.explanation: Cloud (mây) — đám mây trên trời.

questions.questionText: Air that moves fast — good for flying a kite.
questions.explanation: Wind (gió) — gió mạnh thả diều.

questions.questionText: Many clouds in the sky. It is _____.
questions.explanation: Cloudy (có mây) — sunny and cloudy.

questions.questionText: The _____ is strong today. Hold your kite!
questions.explanation: Wind — The wind is strong.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Cloud and Wind
exercises.instructions: Match each word to its Vietnamese meaning.

questions.questionText: Match weather words to Vietnamese meanings.
questions.explanation: Cloud=mây; wind=gió; cloudy=có mây; windy=có gió.

exercises.title: Check: Cloud and Wind Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: It is rainy and _____.
questions.explanation: Windy — It is rainy and windy.

questions.questionText: Anna says: I can see _____.
questions.explanation: Clouds — I can see clouds.

questions.questionText: It is sunny and _____.
questions.explanation: Cloudy — sunny and cloudy.

exercises.title: Apply: Weather and Toys Together
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence.

questions.questionText: Complete: Look at the [0]! | The [1] is strong. | Fly the [2] outside.
questions.explanation: clouds; wind; kite — mây, gió, diều.

content.template: Look at the [0]! The [1] is strong. Fly the [2] outside.

exercises.title: Review: Full Vocabulary
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: How many words are in this unit's vocabulary bank?
questions.explanation: Twelve words: doll, kite, teddy, robot, puzzle, balloon, sunny, rainy, cloud, wind, cloudy, windy.

questions.questionText: Which pair is correct?
questions.explanation: Wind = gió; windy = có gió. Cloud = mây; cloudy = có mây.

questions.questionText: The wind is strong — good for a _____.
questions.explanation: Kite — strong wind helps fly a kite.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: It's + Weather
lessons.learningObjective: Use It's + weather adjective to describe the day.

exercises.title: Learn: It's + Weather Adjective
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: The sun is out. You say: _____ sunny today.
questions.explanation: It's — It is sunny today.

choices.distractorNote: They không dùng với thời tiết

questions.questionText: Rain falls from the sky. Best sentence:
questions.explanation: It's rainy. — mô tả trời mưa.

questions.questionText: Look outside! _____ windy today.
questions.explanation: It's windy — gió mạnh hôm nay.

questions.questionText: Many clouds in the sky. You say:
questions.explanation: It's cloudy. — có nhiều mây.

exercises.title: Practice: Weather Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with It's or a weather word.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] rainy. | [1] sunny and cloudy. | The [2] is strong.
questions.explanation: It's; It's; wind — It's + tính từ; the wind.

content.template: [0] rainy. [1] sunny and cloudy. The [2] is strong.

exercises.title: Check: It's + Weather Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: It's rainy and windy. — hai tính từ thời tiết.

questions.questionText: Today we stay inside because _____ rainy.
questions.explanation: it's — because it's rainy.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is wrong?
questions.explanation: It sunny sai — cần It's / It is.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Weather Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: It's / rainy / and / windy.
questions.explanation: It's rainy and windy. — It's + tính từ + and + tính từ.

questions.questionText: Make: Look / at / the / clouds!
questions.explanation: Look at the clouds! — mệnh lệnh + the + plural.

exercises.title: Review: It's + Weather Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Dad asks: Is it sunny? Anna says: No. _____ rainy.
questions.explanation: It's — No. It's rainy.

questions.questionText: When the sun comes out, you say:
questions.explanation: It's sunny and cloudy. — từ bài đọc.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about strong air outside:
questions.explanation: The wind is strong. — the + wind + is.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Plural — Two Kites
lessons.learningObjective: Add -s to toy nouns after numbers: two kites, three balloons.

exercises.title: Learn: Plural Toy Nouns
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct plural form.

questions.questionText: One kite, two _____.
questions.explanation: Kites — kite + s = kites.

questions.questionText: I have two _____. (balloon)
questions.explanation: Balloons — two balloons.

questions.questionText: Those _____ are on the chair.
questions.explanation: Balloons — Those balloons (số nhiều).

questions.questionText: Anna says: Those _____ are fun!
questions.explanation: Puzzles — Those puzzles are fun.

exercises.title: Practice: Plural Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with the correct plural form.

questions.questionText: Complete: two [0] | three [1] | Those [2] are red and blue.
questions.explanation: kites; balloons; balloons — thêm -s.

content.template: two [0] | three [1] | Those [2] are red and blue.

exercises.title: Check: Plural Toys Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form. No hints.

questions.questionText: Which is correct?
questions.explanation: I have two kites. — two + plural.

questions.questionText: Those puzzles _____ fun.
questions.explanation: Are — puzzles số nhiều → are.

questions.questionText: Which is wrong?
questions.explanation: Two balloon sai — phải two balloons.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Plural Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: I / have / two / kites.
questions.explanation: I have two kites. — số + plural.

questions.questionText: Make: Those / balloons / are / red / and / blue.
questions.explanation: Those balloons are red and blue. — those + plural + are.

exercises.title: Review: Plural Toys Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Mai says: Those _____ are on the chair.
questions.explanation: Balloons — Those balloons are on the chair.

questions.questionText: Complete: two _____ (robot — more than one)
questions.explanation: Robots — two robots.

questions.questionText: These toys _____ on the table.
questions.explanation: Are — toys số nhiều.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: These and Those
lessons.learningObjective: Use these for toys near and those for toys farther away.

exercises.title: Learn: These vs Those
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word.

questions.questionText: Toys in Mai's hands. She says: _____ are my toys.
questions.explanation: These — gần người nói → these.

questions.questionText: Balloons on the chair across the room. Mum says: _____ balloons are red.
questions.explanation: Those — xa hơn → those.

questions.questionText: Best sentence: toys near Mai
questions.explanation: These are my favourite toys.

choices.text: Those are my favourite toys near me.

questions.questionText: Puzzles on a far shelf. Best phrase:
questions.explanation: Those puzzles — xa → those.

exercises.title: Practice: These/Those Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with these or those.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] are my toys. | [1] balloons are on the chair. | [2] puzzles are fun!
questions.explanation: These (gần); Those (xa); Those (xa).

content.template: [0] are my toys. [1] balloons are on the chair. [2] puzzles are fun!

exercises.title: Check: These/Those Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: These are my toys. — these + are + plural.

choices.text: Those are my toys in my hands.

questions.questionText: Kite by the door (far). Mai says:
questions.explanation: That kite is by the door. — xa, số ít → that.

choices.text: This kite is by the door far.
That kite is by the door.
Those kite is by the door.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is wrong?
questions.explanation: Those is balloons sai — Those balloons are…

exercises.title: Apply: Order These/Those Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: These / are / my / toys.
questions.explanation: These are my toys. — these + are + sở hữu + danh từ.

questions.questionText: Make: Those / balloons / are / on / the / chair.
questions.explanation: Those balloons are on the chair. — those + plural + are.

exercises.title: Review: These/Those Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Mai holds teddy and doll. She says:
questions.explanation: These are my favourite toys. — đang cầm = gần.

questions.questionText: Balloons on the chair across the room:
questions.explanation: Those balloons are red and blue.

choices.text: These balloons are red and blue.
Those balloons are red and blue.

questions.questionText: Complete: _____ puzzles are fun! (far shelf)
questions.explanation: Those — xa → those puzzles.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Toy and Weather Words
lessons.learningObjective: Read toy and weather words in context and match them to meanings.

exercises.title: Learn: Read Toy and Weather Words
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: Mai's Toys and Rainy Day
passage.text:
Mai is eight. It is a rainy and windy day. Mai, her brother Nam and her friend Anna stay inside.
Mai plays with her teddy and her doll. Nam has a robot and a puzzle.
"These are my toys," says Mai. "Those balloons are on the chair."

Mum looks out of the window. "Look at the clouds!" she says. They do a puzzle together.
When the sun comes out, it is sunny and cloudy. Dad says, "You can fly your kite outside!"
Mai runs into the garden with her red kite. The wind is strong. Anna has a blue balloon.
They have a happy day with their toys and the weather.

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: Bài về đồ chơi trong nhà ngày mưa và thả diều khi trời nắng.

choices.text: Toys on a rainy day and a kite outside.

questions.questionText: Which word means 'gấu bông'?
questions.explanation: Teddy = gấu bông — Mai plays with her teddy.

exercises.title: Practice: More Words in the Text
exercises.instructions: Read again. Find more toy and weather words.

questions.explanation: Windy — rainy and windy day.

questions.explanation: Fly kite — You can fly your kite outside!

exercises.title: Practice: Kite and Wind Details
exercises.instructions: Read again. Find more details outside.

passage.title: Mai's Toys and Rainy Day
passage.text:
Mai is eight. It is a rainy and windy day. Mai, her brother Nam and her friend Anna stay inside.
Mai plays with her teddy and her doll. Nam has a robot and a puzzle.
"These are my toys," says Mai. "Those balloons are on the chair."

Mum looks out of the window. "Look at the clouds!" she says. They do a puzzle together.
When the sun comes out, it is sunny and cloudy. Dad says, "You can fly your kite outside!"
Mai runs into the garden with her red kite. The wind is strong. Anna has a blue balloon.
They have a happy day with their toys and the weather.

questions.questionText: Mai runs into the garden with her _____ kite.
questions.explanation: Red — her red kite.

questions.questionText: The wind is _____.
questions.explanation: Strong — The wind is strong.

exercises.title: Check: Toys and Weather Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read one more time. Harder questions.

passage.title: Mai's Toys and Rainy Day

Mai plays with her teddy and her doll. Nam has a robot and a puzzle.
"These are my toys," says Mai. "Those balloons are on the chair."

Mum looks out of the window. "Look at the clouds!" she says. They do a puzzle together.
When the sun comes out, it is sunny and cloudy. Dad says, "You can fly your kite outside!"
Mai runs into the garden with her red kite. The wind is strong. Anna has a blue balloon.
They have a happy day with their toys and the weather.

questions.explanation: Balloon — Anna has a blue balloon.

questions.questionText: How do they feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Happy — They have a happy day.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Mai's Favourite Toys
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to Mai and Mum and identify favourite toys indoors.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen — Mai's Toys
exercises.instructions: Listen to the conversation. Choose the correct answer.

script.title: Mai's Favourite Toys
script.setting: Mai's living room on a rainy day

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: What are your favourite toys, Mai?

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: These are my favourite toys. I like my teddy and my doll.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: And Nam?

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: Nam has a robot. His puzzle is on the table.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Do you have balloons?

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: Yes! Those balloons are red and blue.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Today is rainy. We stay inside.

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: OK. We play with our toys.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: Mai likes her teddy and her _____.
questions.explanation: Doll — I like my teddy and my doll.

questions.questionText: What does Nam have?
questions.explanation: Robot — Nam has a robot.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Anna, Weather and Kite
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to Dad, Anna and Mai about weather and the kite.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen — Weather and Kite
exercises.instructions: Listen to the dialogue. Answer the questions.

script.title: Anna, Weather and the Kite
script.setting: By the window — then planning to go outside

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Look outside. Is it sunny?

lines.speaker: Anna
lines.text: No. It is rainy and windy. I can see clouds.

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: Can we fly my kite?

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Not now. When it is sunny, you can go outside.

lines.speaker: Anna
lines.text: The wind is strong today!

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: OK. These are my toys inside. That kite is by the door.

lines.speaker: Anna
lines.text: I have a blue balloon. Those puzzles are fun!

questions.questionText: Anna says: It is rainy and _____.
questions.explanation: Windy — It is rainy and windy.

questions.questionText: Anna can see _____.
questions.explanation: Clouds — I can see clouds.

exercises.title: Practice: More from Weather Dialogue
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Answer the next questions.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Write About Toys
lessons.learningObjective: Write short phrases about toys using these and plural forms.

exercises.title: Learn: Toy Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences about toys.

questions.questionText: Complete: These are my [0]. | Nam has a [1]. | I like my [2].
questions.explanation: toys; robot; teddy/doll — khung viết đồ chơi.

content.template: These are my [0]. Nam has a [1]. I like my [2].

exercises.title: Practice: Order Toy Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: These / are / my / toys.
questions.explanation: These are my toys. — viết về đồ chơi gần.

questions.questionText: Make: Nam / has / a / robot.
questions.explanation: Nam has a robot. — câu về đồ chơi Nam.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Your Toys
exercises.instructions: Write short answers. Use 1–5 words for each answer.

content.taskDescription: Write about toys using words from the unit.
prompts: 1. Write one toy word (doll, teddy, robot…).
successCriteria: Uses at least one toy word
Uses these or a plural -s form
Spelling of core words is recognisable

modelAnswer.text: teddy These are my toys. I have two kites.

grammar.criteria: Dùng It's + thời tiết, these/those hoặc số nhiều -s đúng.

vocabulary.criteria: Dùng từ đồ chơi và thời tiết trong unit.

organization.criteria: Câu ngắn rõ ràng; trả lời đủ phần.

taskAchievement.criteria: Hoàn thành nhiệm vụ; tối thiểu 5 từ (Starters).

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Choose the Best Toy Sentence
exercises.instructions: Choose the best written sentence.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about Mai's toys:
questions.explanation: These are my toys. — these + are + plural.

choices.text: Those are my toys in my hands.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about balloons:
questions.explanation: Those balloons are red and blue.

choices.text: Those balloons are red and blue.

exercises.title: Review: Toy Writing
exercises.instructions: Complete the writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: Mai plays with her [0]. | Anna likes her [1]. | Two [2] are fun.
questions.explanation: teddy; doll; puzzles/kites — đồ chơi unit.

content.template: Mai plays with her [0]. Anna likes her [1]. Two [2] are fun.

questions.explanation: Look at the clouds! — Mum in reading.

content.taskDescription: Write about weather from the reading text.
prompts: 2. Write: It is windy and _____. (cloudy or rainy)
3. Write: Look at the _____! (cloud or clouds)

Uses It's or It is correctly

questions.explanation: That kite is by the door. — xa, số ít.

exercises.title: Check: Write These and Those
exercises.instructions: Write short phrases with these/those and plurals.

content.taskDescription: Write short phrases using these, those, or plural toy nouns.
prompts: 1. Write: These are my _____. (toys or balloons)
2. Write: Those _____ are on the chair. (balloons)
3. Write: two _____ (add -s to kite or puzzle)

modelAnswer.text: These are my toys. Those balloons are on the chair. two kites

grammar.criteria: Dùng It's + thời tiết, these/those hoặc số nhiều -s đúng.

vocabulary.criteria: Dùng từ đồ chơi và thời tiết trong unit.

organization.criteria: Câu ngắn rõ ràng; trả lời đủ phần.

taskAchievement.criteria: Hoàn thành nhiệm vụ; tối thiểu 5 từ (Starters).

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Write These/Those Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the gap-fill writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] are my favourite toys. | [1] balloons are red. | I have two [2].
questions.explanation: These; Those; kites/balloons — hỗn hợp.

content.template: [0] are my favourite toys. [1] balloons are red. I have two [2].

exercises.title: Review: These/Those Writing Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose or complete frames.

questions.questionText: Best written phrase:
questions.explanation: Two kites — số + plural.

questions.questionText: Which is wrong to write?
questions.explanation: These is my toys sai — These are my toys.

questions.questionText: Balloons on the chair (far). Best:
questions.explanation: Those balloons are on the chair.

choices.text: These balloons are on the chair far.
Those balloons are on the chair.
Those balloon is on the chair.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Talk About Toys
lessons.learningObjective: Answer simple questions about toys with short phrases.

exercises.title: Learn: What to Say About Toys
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say.

content.sceneDescription: Mai's home on a rainy and windy day. Mai is eight. She plays with her teddy and doll inside. Her brother Nam has a robot and a puzzle on the table. Red and blue balloons are on the chair. Her friend Anna visits. Mum says they must stay inside. Clouds are in the sky.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: Do you have toys? You say:
questions.explanation: Yes. / Yes, I have toys.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: What is your favourite toy? You say:
questions.explanation: My teddy. / I like my teddy and doll.

choices.text: I like my teddy and doll.

exercises.title: Practice: Toy Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

content.sceneDescription: Mai's home on a rainy and windy day. Mai is eight. She plays with her teddy and doll inside. Her brother Nam has a robot and a puzzle on the table. Red and blue balloons are on the chair. Her friend Anna visits. Mum says they must stay inside. Clouds are in the sky.

questions.questionText: Mum asks: What does Nam have? You say:
questions.explanation: A robot. / Nam has a robot.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: Where is the puzzle? You say:
questions.explanation: On the table.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About Your Toys
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions. Say at least one word for each question.

content.prompt: The examiner will ask you about toys at home. Answer in short phrases.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: Mai's home on a rainy and windy day. Mai is eight. She plays with her teddy and doll inside. Her brother Nam has a robot and a puzzle on the table. Red and blue balloons are on the chair. Her friend Anna visits. Mum says they must stay inside. Clouds are in the sky.
followUpQuestions: What is your favourite toy — a teddy or a doll?
What does Nam have — a robot or a kite?
How many balloons do you see?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ đồ chơi và thời tiết (kite, sunny, balloon…) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng It's + thời tiết hoặc these/those / số nhiều -s trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Toy Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Point to toys in your hands. You say:
questions.explanation: These are my toys.

questions.questionText: Say what Anna likes. You say:
questions.explanation: She likes her doll. / Anna likes her doll.

exercises.title: Review: Toy Speaking
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken reply.

questions.questionText: How many balloons on the chair? You say:
questions.explanation: Two. / Red and blue balloons.

questions.questionText: Describe Nam's toys. You say:
questions.explanation: A robot and a puzzle.

questions.questionText: Say one sentence with these + toys. You say:
questions.explanation: These are my toys.

choices.text: Those are my toys in my hands.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Talk About the Weather
lessons.learningObjective: Answer questions about weather with It's + adjective.

exercises.title: Learn: Weather Speaking Phrases
exercises.instructions: Read the scene description. Choose the best answer.

content.sceneDescription: Mai's home on a rainy and windy day. Mai is eight. She plays with her teddy and doll inside. Her brother Nam has a robot and a puzzle on the table. Red and blue balloons are on the chair. Her friend Anna visits. Mum says they must stay inside. Clouds are in the sky.

questions.questionText: What is the weather like? You say:
questions.explanation: It's rainy and windy.

questions.questionText: Mum says: Look at the sky! You say:
questions.explanation: Clouds! / Look at the clouds!

exercises.title: Practice: Weather Questions
exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say about the weather.

content.sceneDescription: Mai's home on a rainy and windy day. Mai is eight. She plays with her teddy and doll inside. Her brother Nam has a robot and a puzzle on the table. Red and blue balloons are on the chair. Her friend Anna visits. Mum says they must stay inside. Clouds are in the sky.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Is it sunny now? You say:
questions.explanation: No. It's rainy.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Can you fly a kite now? You say:
questions.explanation: No. We stay inside.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About the Weather
exercises.instructions: Answer about the weather today.

content.prompt: Read the scene. The examiner asks about the weather and clouds.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: Mai's home on a rainy and windy day. Mai is eight. She plays with her teddy and doll inside. Her brother Nam has a robot and a puzzle on the table. Red and blue balloons are on the chair. Her friend Anna visits. Mum says they must stay inside. Clouds are in the sky.
followUpQuestions: What is the weather like today?
Can Mai fly her kite now?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ đồ chơi và thời tiết (kite, sunny, balloon…) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng It's + thời tiết hoặc these/those / số nhiều -s trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Weather Speaking
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Describe the wind. You say:
questions.explanation: The wind is strong.

questions.questionText: Say it's cloudy later. You say:
questions.explanation: It's sunny and cloudy.

exercises.title: Review: Weather Speaking Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase.

questions.questionText: Why stay inside? You say:
questions.explanation: Because it's rainy and windy.

questions.questionText: Anna sees clouds. You say:
questions.explanation: I can see clouds.

choices.text: I can see robots in the sky.

questions.questionText: Say: It's _____. (windy)
questions.explanation: It's windy.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: These and Those Speaking
lessons.learningObjective: Use these, those, and plurals when talking about toys.

exercises.title: Learn: These/Those Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

content.sceneDescription: Later the sun comes out. It is sunny and cloudy. Mai, Nam and Anna go into the garden. Mai flies her red kite. The wind is strong. Anna holds a blue balloon. Dad says they can play outside now. Toys stay inside; the kite and balloon are outside.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Point to toys near you. You say:
questions.explanation: These are my toys.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Balloons on the chair (far). You say:
questions.explanation: Those balloons are red and blue.

choices.text: Those balloons are on the chair.

exercises.title: Practice: More These/Those Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say.

content.sceneDescription: Later the sun comes out. It is sunny and cloudy. Mai, Nam and Anna go into the garden. Mai flies her red kite. The wind is strong. Anna holds a blue balloon. Dad says they can play outside now. Toys stay inside; the kite and balloon are outside.

questions.questionText: Kite by the door. You say:
questions.explanation: That kite is by the door.

choices.text: This kite is by the door far.
That kite is by the door.
Those kite is by the door.

questions.questionText: Anna: Those puzzles are fun! You say:
questions.explanation: Yes! Those puzzles are fun!

exercises.title: Check: These and Those Speaking
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions in short phrases.

content.prompt: The examiner asks about toys near and far. Use these, those, or plurals.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: Later the sun comes out. It is sunny and cloudy. Mai, Nam and Anna go into the garden. Mai flies her red kite. The wind is strong. Anna holds a blue balloon. Dad says they can play outside now. Toys stay inside; the kite and balloon are outside.
followUpQuestions: Where are the balloons — inside or outside?
Say: That kite is _____. (by the door / outside)
How many kites does Mai have?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ đồ chơi và thời tiết (kite, sunny, balloon…) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng It's + thời tiết hoặc these/those / số nhiều -s trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick These/Those Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Say: two kites. You say:
questions.explanation: Two kites. — plural -s.

questions.questionText: Mai flies her kite outside. You say:
questions.explanation: Mai flies her red kite.

choices.text: Mai flies her red kites inside.

exercises.title: Review: These/Those Speaking Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

questions.questionText: These are my favourite _____. You say:
questions.explanation: Toys — from listening script.

questions.questionText: Those balloons _____ red and blue. You say:
questions.explanation: Are — balloons số nhiều.

questions.questionText: Say one sentence with those + plural toy. Best:
questions.explanation: Those balloons are on the chair.

choices.text: Those balloon is on the chair.
Those balloons are on the chair.

choices.distractorNote: Xa → those OK nhưng câu mẫu chair
